ValidationRule.description: This rule ensures that a reason is provided when the training stage is marked as 'Not Trained'. It prevents saving the record without a valid explanation, thereby maintaining data integrity and clarity in training documentation.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), $Profile.Name != 'Trainer Login Based', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL(Training_Stage__c, "Not Trained"), ISBLANK(TEXT(Not_Trained_Reason__c ))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please select a reason the customer was not trained.
